taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Large Language Models, Object-oriented programming, DataBricks
skill_match_scores: Artificial Intelligence:1.0, Data Science:1.0, Large Language Models:1.0, Object-oriented programming:1.0, DataBricks:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree from a four-year college or university, Experience with Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Large Language Models, Object-oriented programming experience, Working knowledge of DataBricks, 2+ years in a technical role with experience leading projects, 2+ years if educational level is masters, Solid understanding of data analytics and business intelligence tools such as Python, R, SQL, Domo, Tableau, and PowerBI, Expert presentation skills
preferred_quals: Master's degree, Experience in integrated marketing, digital agency, marketing services, or consulting environments
core_responsibilities: As a technical developer our AI team, work with strategic clients to help them utilize their data to take action, Stay up-to-date on the latest AI tools and features, Provide Technical solutioning for our generative AI projects, Participate in code reviews and solutioning sessions with our data scientists, ai engineers, software engineers, and other technical resources, Lead cross-functional projects and enable collaboration across artificial intelligence and OneMagnify
job_summary: OneMagnify is an AI native, platform-enabled B2B digital agency that operates at the intersection of data, technology, and creativity. They are seeking a client-facing Technical AI Engineer who will support the development and deployment of AI initiatives, ensuring high-quality execution and timely delivery for clients.
